title: 第1節　薄明の玄関
continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the apartment-departure incident paired with scene-001-001-002-sera.
Keep the same dawn apartment corridor, doorway, and cool spring jogging outfit continuity in both images.
prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第1章　朝の河畔 / 第1話　走る支度. Scene focus: 第1節　薄明の玄関 / サトーパート. Summary: 目覚ましが鳴る少し前に、サトーは自然に目を開けた。四月初旬の朝は、布団を出た瞬間だけまだ少し冷たい。その半端な温度が、かえって走る気を起こさせる。冬ほど億劫ではなく、初夏ほど重… Key beats: 目覚ましが鳴る少し前に、サトーは自然に目を開けた。四月初旬の朝は、布団を出た瞬間だけまだ少し冷たい。その半端な温度が、かえって走る気を起こさせる。冬ほど億劫ではなく、初夏ほど重くもない。今朝くらいがいちばん素直に身体が前へ出る、と彼は思った。 洗面所で顔を洗い、キッチンで水をひと口飲んでから、クローゼットの前に立つ。吸汗の長袖トップスに、薄いネイビーのランニングジャケット、細身の黒いランニングパンツ。河川敷の風を考えれば、最初の一枚はあったほうがいい。靴ひもを結びながら、サトーはスポーツウォッチの画面を軽く叩いた。 窓を少しだけ開けると、外気の中に桜の青い匂いが混じっていた。白鷺川の土手は、今週がいちばんいい頃合いだろう。満開よりも、散りはじめのほうが走っていて楽しい。風が吹くたびに景色が少しずつ崩れていく感じが、朝の身体にはよく似合う。 玄関で肩を回し、ふくらはぎを軽く伸ばす。四十五歳になると、走る前の数分を雑にしたぶんだけ帰りの膝に返ってくる。準備を丁寧にするのは老けたからではなく、もうそれで十分に楽しいと知っているからだった。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-side first section of the apartment-departure incident paired with scene-001-001-002-sera. Keep the same dawn apartment corridor, doorway, and cool spring jogging outfit continuity in both images. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Compose a calm early-morning apartment departure scene with Sato dominant near his doorway or hallway mirror, already dressed for a cool spring jog. The mood should be orderly and quietly pleased. If Sera appears at all, place her far away near a stairwell shadow or service corner, clearly separate from Sato.
